curriculumRef.value: NCE Chemistry Year 1 — CHE 111 General Chemistry

blocks.title: Chemical bonding overview

citations.excerpt: Covalent bonding involves the sharing of electron pairs between non-metal atoms.
Metallic bonding is described by the electron sea model, where a lattice of positive metal ions is immersed in a cloud of delocalized valence electrons.

blocks.body: Chemical bonds form in three main ways: **ionic** (electron transfer), **covalent** (electron sharing), and **metallic** (delocalised electron sea).
